items.title: Last night we reported the Lakers' rising interest in Toronto free agent Sandro Mamukelashvili.
items.author: Marc Stein
items.body_excerpt:
Last night we reported the Lakers' rising interest in Toronto free agent Sandro Mamukelashvili.

Now league sources tell @jakelfischer.bsky.social and me that Philadelphia's Quentin Grimes is emerging as another top Lakers target.

MORE Intel here: tinyurl.com/bde3f33k

📸: @clutchpoints.bsky.social

items.title: One fun thing about catching up on FA chatter is finding myself thinking, "Why is it that, whenever I see Sandro Mamukelashvili's name, I immediately think about Flavor Flav?" And I remember it's because A) they're pals, B) I wrote about that and C) my brain's not totally gone. y
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: One fun thing about catching up on FA chatter is finding myself thinking, "Why is it that, whenever I see Sandro Mamukelashvili's name, I immediately think about Flavor Flav?" And I remember it's because A) they're pals, B) I wrote about that and C) my brain's not totally gone. yhoo.it/4hsCoPp

media.title: Spurs' Sandro Mamukelashvili scores NBA record 34 points in 19 minutes, celebrates feat with Flavor Flav
media.description: It's the most points that any player has ever scored in fewer than 20 minutes.

items.title: Toronto Raptors big man Sandro Mamukelashvili is declining his $2.8 million player option for 2026-27 to become a free agent, George Roussakis and Mark Bartelstein of @PrioritySports tell ESPN. Mamukelashvili will have a strong developing market in free agency.
